headline: 200 spots. First access to invest in FarmThru.
subhead: VIP members get priority when the equity crowdfunding campaign opens on Birchal in July 2026.
hero_copy:
FarmThru is opening to investors for the first time. Before the campaign goes live, we're giving 200 people early access.

A $5 refundable deposit secures your VIP spot. That means first access to invest, priority updates from the founders, and an exclusive Q&A before the campaign opens to everyone.

sections.heading: What VIP access gets you
sections.body:
First access to invest when the Birchal campaign opens. Priority updates on FarmThru's progress, financials, and plans. An exclusive Q&A session with the founding team. And your $5 deposit is fully refundable at any time, no questions asked.

This isn't a commitment to invest. It's a commitment to being informed first.

sections.heading: What you're investing in
sections.body:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. 50+ regenerative farms across NSW. 2,000+ families already ordering. A hub-and-collect model that gets food from paddock to pick-up in 2-3 days.

100% grass-fed beef. Pasture-raised chicken. Heritage pork. Wild-caught salmon. Every product from a named farm. No hormones, no feedlots, no unnecessary middlemen.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
Equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal, launching July 2026. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum cap: $10,000 per investor.

VIP deposit: $5 (fully refundable). Only 200 VIP spots available.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: bold typography with a live counter showing remaining VIP spots (e.g. '147 of 200 spots remaining'). Below-fold: traction metrics, farm partner grid, VIP perks checklist. Urgency without desperation. Clean design with a single form: name, email, $5 deposit button. Birchal badge visible.
